aiSettings.heading: AI providers
aiSettings.loginViaCodexTitle: Runs `codex login` — sign-in opens in the browser.
aiSettings.openLoginTerminalTitle: Opens a terminal with Claude Code CLI — type /login to sign in with your subscription.
aiSettings.anthropicStatusHelp: The Anthropic sign-in status is a heuristic (based on Claude Code CLI login files). After signing in in the terminal, refresh the status.
aiSettings.aiResponseLanguageHelp: Empty = AI replies in Polish. Type any language for generated content.
aiSettings.reasoningHelp: Shared across Codex, OpenAI API and Claude Code CLI (for Claude it maps to <effort>--effort</effort>). The same value drives the slider in the model panel on the top bar.
aiSettings.comfyuiWorkflowPlaceholder: Paste the JSON exported via "Save (API Format)"
aiSettings.comfyuiHelp: In the workflow use the placeholders {{prompt}}, {{negative}} and {{seed}} in the positive text, negative text and seed fields. Export: ComfyUI → Save (API Format).
aiSettings.keysHelp: Keys are stored locally in the app settings file and sent only to the selected provider.
aiSettings.plnRateTitle: Used only for a rough conversion of generation costs to PLN.
aiSettings.missingOpenaiKey: OpenAI API provider selected, but no OpenAI key was provided.
aiSettings.missingAnthropicKey: Anthropic API provider selected, but no Anthropic key was provided.

codex-cli.label: Codex CLI (OpenAI subscription)
codex-cli.hint: Current default. Requires a signed-in Codex CLI.

claude-cli.label: Claude Code CLI (Anthropic subscription)
claude-cli.hint: Requires an installed and signed-in Claude Code CLI.

openai-api.label: OpenAI API (key)
openai-api.hint: Direct API calls — billed per token.

anthropic-api.label: Anthropic API (key)
anthropic-api.hint: Direct API calls — billed per token.

codex-cli.label: Codex CLI (OpenAI subscription)
codex-cli.hint: Current default — generation via the image_generation tool.

local-sdwebui.label: Local SD WebUI / A1111
local-sdwebui.hint: Requires a running WebUI with the --api flag.

local-comfyui.label: Local ComfyUI
local-comfyui.hint: Requires pasting a workflow in API format.
